author: doll-agent
content: Added predict_log_proba to all 9 classifiers via shared crate::log_proba helper that clamps probabilities below 1e-300 to avoid -inf/NaN. Affected: FittedDecisionTreeClassifier, FittedExtraTreeClassifier, FittedRandomForestClassifier, FittedExtraTreesClassifier, FittedGradientBoostingClassifier, FittedHistGradientBoostingClassifier, FittedAdaBoostClassifier, FittedBaggingClassifier, FittedVotingClassifier. All 343 tests pass.
